---
title: "Title of talk"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: FIGURES/HCAP-XC-Watermark-20260304.png
  data-background-size: contain
  data-background-opacity: "1"
author: "Author Name"
date: 2026-03-03
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    self-contained: true
    code-copy: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    fig-align: center
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
editor: source
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      .reveal .slide-number {
        top: 1em !important;
        right: 1em !important;
        bottom: auto !important;
        left: auto !important;
      }
      .reveal pre {
        max-height: 850px !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
      }
      .reveal pre code {
        max-height: 850px !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
      }
      </style>
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false

# Load libraries and environment settings
# Do analyses where code and output is
# not necessarily intended to share with
# audience
source(here::here("R", "000-Libraries.R"))
source(here::here("R", "001-Environment-settings.R"))
```

# Introduction

<!-- Include individual slides -->

{{< include R/010-Introduction.qmd >}}


---

(fin)
